sources.title: GPT-5.5 in ChatGPT
sources.quote: GPT-5.5 Instant in ChatGPT is the default for all logged-in users, and a single auto-switching system that brings together the best of our models into a smart, fast single experience. sources.quote: Claude Opus 4.7 `anthropic/claude-opus-4-7` 68.2 Best Claude-series result in the OpenHands Index. Use it for complex, long-running software work.
